title: Water Supply Disruption – April 12
content: Due to municipal water main repairs, there will be no water supply on April 12th from 9 AM to 5 PM. Please store sufficient water beforehand. Tanker water will be arranged for emergency needs.

title: Annual General Meeting – April 20
content: The Annual General Meeting for Sunrise Heights will be held on April 20th at 6 PM in the Community Hall. Agenda includes budget review, upcoming projects, and committee elections. All residents are encouraged to attend.

title: Maintenance Charges Revised for FY 2026-27
content: The maintenance charges have been revised effective April 2026. 2BHK flats: ₹3,500/month, 3BHK flats: ₹4,500/month. The revision was approved in the committee meeting held on March 25, 2026.

title: Elevator Maintenance – Block A & B
content: Annual elevator maintenance will be carried out in Block A and Block B on April 15-16. The elevators will be non-operational during this period (8 AM – 6 PM). Please use the stairs. We apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Holi Celebration – Colours of Joy
content: Join us for the community Holi celebration on March 25th from 10 AM to 1 PM at the clubhouse lawn. Organic colors, water balloons, DJ music, and snacks will be arranged. Entry is free for all residents!

title: Parking Allotment Updated
content: The parking allotment has been updated. Please check the notice board near the security cabin for your assigned parking slot. Any discrepancies should be reported to the admin office within 3 days.

title: Pest Control Drive – April 18
content: A society-wide pest control drive is scheduled for April 18th. The team will visit each flat between 9 AM and 5 PM. Please ensure someone is available at home. Pets should be kept in a safe area during treatment.
